utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: Oh , um , I do not know if that is a good idea .

utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: Oh . Look , just friends , I will not grope you . I promise .

utterances.speaker: Monica
utterances.text: No , I just I think that it is too soon .

utterances.speaker: Richard
utterances.text: No it is not too soon , I had lunch at a eleven .
